title: TaskFormSchema
description: A TaskFormSchema defines the form structure for creating or resolving a specific type of task. It includes a JSON Schema for validation and a UI schema for rendering.

id.description: Unique identifier (UUID) for this form schema.

name.description: Unique key for this form schema (e.g., 'DescriptionSuggestion').

displayName.description: Display name for the form schema.

taskType.description: The task type this form schema applies to.

taskCategory.description: The task category this form schema applies to.

formSchema.description: JSON Schema object defining the form fields and validation.

uiSchema.description: RJSF uiSchema object for customizing form rendering.

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the form schema.

changeDescription.description: Change that lead to this version of the entity.

deleted.description: When true indicates the entity has been soft deleted.
